name: HYDROPLANT Tycoon
short_description: Start with tiny sprouts and nurture them into thriving crops using advanced hydroponics! Design your own farming system, experiment with different plants, customize your setup, and meet market demands to grow your business. Discover the perfect harmony of nature and technology!
detailed_description:
Hydroplant Tycoon follows the journey of an ordinary white-collar worker who, upon receiving an unexpected offer from his uncle, embarks on building a sustainable hydroponic farming empire in the city center. With your uncle's investment support, construct a high-tech farm from scratch and discover the perfect harmony between nature and technology.

🌱 From Seedling to Harvest: The Farming Process

  • Begin your journey by purchasing various seeds from the market.

  • Carefully germinate your seeds using appropriate equipment to grow healthy seedlings.

  • Transfer your seedlings to hydroponic systems that rely on nutrient-rich water instead of soil.

  • Manage water flow, nutrient balance, and environmental conditions to maximize efficiency.

  • Experiment with different plant species, each with unique growth rates and market values, to diversify your crops.

Your uncle's allocated land becomes a space visited by city dwellers. Among these visitors, there may be thieves; stay vigilant and protect your farm when necessary. Causing harm to non-thief visitors results in monetary penalties imposed by your uncle.

Expand your land by acquiring new greenhouses and cultivate plants wherever you desire. Items placed neatly inside greenhouses are more challenging for thieves to steal.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
